discovery.run_summary: Mixed tape: mega-cap AI/semis ripping (NVDA +6%, ORCL +10%, HPE blowout) while defensives (XLU -3%, XLP, XLV) and consumer cyclicals (XLY -2.2%) sell off hard. VIX up nearly 5% despite SPY green — sector dispersion is the story. Among mid-caps, MANH filed a restructuring 8-K alongside a sharp gap up, and DKS sold off post-earnings.

notable_index_moves: XLU -2.97% and XLRE -1.64% — defensive rotation OUT despite VIX up, unusual pairing suggests rate/yield-driven not risk-off
XLK +2.48% and SMH +1.48% driven by NVDA/ORCL/AVGO/TSM AI complex; HPE +30% on earnings amplifying AI capex narrative
META -5% and TSLA -4.5% diverging from QQQ strength — idiosyncratic mega-cap weakness
IWM -0.5% vs SPY +0.27% — small caps lagging, KRE -1.87% confirms regional bank softness

discoveries.name: Manhattan Associates, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Restructuring 8-K paired with sharp gap up — market reading cost discipline favorably
discoveries.thesis: MANH filed an Item 2.05 (restructuring/exit costs) plus 7.01 (Reg FD) and the stock is up sharply on above-average volume, extending a multi-day rally. Restructurings filed as standalone events (not bundled with bad earnings) are often read as proactive margin/cost discipline by SaaS investors, especially in supply-chain software where peers have been pressured. The 7.01 disclosure likely contains framing/guidance that the market is digesting positively. If management is reaffirming or raising guidance alongside cost takeouts, follow-through is likely as sell-side updates models.
discoveries.what_confirms: 7.01 exhibit contains reaffirmed/raised FY guidance, or restructuring is framed as reallocating headcount toward AI/cloud product lines with quantified margin uplift; analyst upgrades in next 48 hours
discoveries.what_kills: Restructuring is actually a response to weakening bookings/RPO trends disclosed in the 7.01; or the move is purely sympathy with the broader software/AI tape (XLK +2.48%) and fades when sector rotates
discoveries.what_to_learn: Standalone Item 2.05 filings (without accompanying 2.02 earnings miss or 4.02 restatement) often signal proactive management action and are read bullishly by SaaS investors — different reflex from industrials where restructuring usually signals trouble
discoveries.catalyst: 8-K filed 2026-06-01 with Items 2.05 (restructuring) and 7.01 (Reg FD disclosure)
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: The pairing of 2.05 with a 7.01 same-day suggests management is framing the restructuring with a forward-looking narrative; the market's positive reaction implies the framing landed
research_pointers: Read the 7.01 exhibit verbatim — is guidance reaffirmed, raised, or merely qualitative?
Check whether restructuring charges are quantified and what % of opex they represent
Compare RPO/bookings commentary vs prior quarter's call
Check if any analyst price target changes hit the tape today

discoveries.name: Dick's Sporting Goods Inc
discoveries.setup: Post-earnings drift lower in a weak consumer cyclical tape
discoveries.thesis: DKS reported on 5/27 (Items 2.02 + 8.01 + 9.01) and the stock is now down meaningfully cumulatively. XLY is -2.22% today, so today's leg is partly sector sympathy on top of an already-soft earnings reaction. The 8.01 catch-all alongside 2.02 sometimes signals a separately disclosed item (Foot Locker integration update is the obvious candidate given recent M&A). Magnitude looks consistent with weak consumer tape + integration overhang — not obviously overdone or underdone.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued bleed on rising volume into next consumer data print
discoveries.what_kills: Sharp reversal if the 8.01 disclosure turns out to be benign (e.g., a buyback authorization rather than guidance cut)
discoveries.catalyst: Q1 earnings report 5/27 with separate 8.01 disclosure, compounded by XLY weakness today
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: 2.02 + 8.01 same filing typically means earnings + a second material item; the post-earnings drift pattern suggests the market is still digesting
research_pointers: Read the 8.01 exhibit — Foot Locker integration commentary or guidance revision?
Compare DKS move to other specialty retailers (FL, ASO, HIBB) for sector vs idiosyncratic split
Check comp sales trend and gross margin commentary

discoveries.name: Alpha Metallurgical Resources
discoveries.setup: Sharp multi-day run with no SEC filings and no scheduled earnings
discoveries.thesis: Met coal name extending a strong multi-day rally on no company-specific catalyst visible to us. Could be coking coal price strength, China stimulus chatter, or short squeeze dynamics — none of which I can verify from the data provided. Volume only roughly average, which argues against a fundamental catalyst.
discoveries.what_confirms: Met coal price data shows a corresponding spike; peers (METC, HCC, WHC) moving in sympathy
discoveries.what_kills: Peers flat or down while AMR runs alone, suggesting idiosyncratic technical action
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — possibly met coal price action or peer sympathy
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals is empty; no 8-K, no earnings
research_pointers: Check spot coking coal prices and Australian premium hard coking coal benchmark
Review peer moves (METC, HCC, BTU) over the same window
Check short interest — AMR has historically been a squeeze candidate

discoveries.name: BridgeBio Pharma
discoveries.setup: Elevated volume into modest down move following an 8.01 disclosure, against weak biotech tape
discoveries.thesis: BBIO filed an 8.01 + 9.01 on 5/27 (likely a clinical or commercial update on Attruby/acoramidis) and has drifted down on >2.5x volume into a soft XBI tape (-2.25%). The volume signature suggests material news but the modest price reaction is ambiguous — could be a digestion phase before a larger move either direction. Without reading the 8.01 exhibit, I can't tell if it's a script update (likely market-moving) or routine.
discoveries.what_confirms: 8.01 exhibit reveals Attruby Q1 script/revenue data — direction depends on whether it beat or missed consensus
discoveries.what_kills: Exhibit is administrative (e.g., conference presentation slides), making this just XBI sympathy
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: 2.55x volume with only modest price change suggests two-sided flow on a material disclosure
research_pointers: Read the 8.01 exhibit — is it Attruby launch update, trial data, or financing?
Check IQVIA/Symphony script data for acoramidis if available
Compare to TTR peer reaction (PFE/tafamidis commentary, ALNY)

ai_announcements.headline: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
ai_announcements.summary: Nvidia partnering with MSFT, DELL, HPQ on AI agent PCs targeting the CPU market - implicit threat to Intel/AMD CPU dominance.
ai_announcements.no_match_note: None of the moving stocks in market_data (AMR, MANH, EXTR, DKS, BEAM, SKYW, BBIO) have a clean link to this Nvidia AI PC announcement. INTC/AMD would be the natural reads but not in the moved list.

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: The day's AI announcements do not map to any of the provided stock movers. MANH (+7.4%) filed an 8-K with a 2.05 restructuring item - that is the catalyst, NOT AI news, despite MANH being an AI-adjacent supply chain software name. DKS (-4.7%) moved on its 5/27 earnings 8-K, not AI. AMR, EXTR, BEAM, SKYW, BBIO moves are unrelated to today's AI headlines. Nvidia AI PC story is the most market-relevant AI item but its natural targets (INTC, AMD, AAPL) are not in the movers list. Quiet AI-to-stock-reaction night in this universe.
